TYPES.FPCLINE: tt_vepo TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t_vepo.
tt_pack TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_pack.
tt_adr TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_adr.
tt_likp TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_likp.
tt_stpo TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_stpo.

INITIALIZATION.FPCLINE: SELECT SINGLE * FROM VBFA INTO LS_VBFA
SELECT SINGLE * FROM VBRK INTO GS_VBRK
LO_TEXT_READER->READ_TEXT_STRING( EXPORTING ID = 'Z007' NAME = LV_TEXTNAME OBJECT = 'VBBK' IMPORTING LV_LINES = DATA(LV_LINES1) ).
* CONCATENATE LV_TEXT LS_LINE-TDLINE INTO LV_TEXT SEPARATED BY SPACE.
LO_TEXT_READER->READ_TEXT_STRING( EXPORTING ID = 'Z008' NAME = LV_TEXTNAME OBJECT = 'VBBK' IMPORTING LV_LINES = LV_LINES1 ).
* CONCATENATE LV_TEXT LS_LINE-TDLINE INTO LV_TEXT SEPARATED BY SPACE.
LO_TEXT_READER->READ_TEXT_STRING( EXPORTING ID = 'Z006' NAME = LV_TEXTNAME OBJECT = 'VBBK' IMPORTING LV_LINES = LV_LINES1 ).
* CONCATENATE LV_TEXT LS_LINE-TDLINE INTO LV_TEXT SEPARATED BY SPACE.
LO_TEXT_READER->READ_TEXT_STRING( EXPORTING ID = 'Z010' NAME = LV_TEXTNAME OBJECT = 'VBBK' IMPORTING LV_LINES = LV_LINES1 ).
* CONCATENATE LV_TEXT LS_LINE-TDLINE INTO LV_TEXT SEPARATED BY SPACE.
"CONFIRM THE FORM AND THEN REPLACE READ TEXT
LO_TEXT_READER->READ_TEXT_STRING( EXPORTING ID = 'Z040' NAME = LV_TEXTNAME OBJECT = 'VBBK' IMPORTING LV_LINES = LV_LINES1 ).
** CONCATENATE lv_text ls_line-tdline INTO lv_text SEPARATED BY space.
** CONCATENATE lv_text ls_line-TDLINE INTO lv_text SEPARATED BY cl_abap_char_utilities=>newline. "FR
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'Z033' name = LV_TEXTNAME object = 'VBBK' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
* CONCATENATE LV_TEXT LS_LINE-TDLINE INTO LV_TEXT SEPARATED BY SPACE.
* set textnames for header, adress and footer
* INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE it_vepo
INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE IT_VEPO
SELECT SINGLE * FROM ADRC INTO GS_PL_ADRC
SELECT SINGLE LANDX FROM T005T INTO GV_PL_LANDX
SELECT SINGLE * FROM T005U INTO GS_PL_T005U
SELECT SINGLE J_1IEXCD FROM J_1IMOCOMP INTO GV_PL_1IEXCD
DATA : IT_SO TYPE TABLE OF T_VBELV.
SELECT SINGLE VSART ZTERM INCO1 INCO2
VERUR FROM LIKP INTO TABLE IT_LIKP
READ TABLE IT_LIKP INTO WA_LIKP INDEX 1.
SELECT SINGLE KUNNR FROM VBPA INTO L_KUNNR
CONCATENATE 'FAX : ' WA_ADRC1-FAX_NUMBER INTO LV_FAX SEPARATED BY ' '..
SELECT SINGLE ADRNR FROM KNA1 INTO LV_ADRNR
SELECT SINGLE * FROM T005U INTO GS_KU_T005U
SELECT SINGLE LANDX FROM T005T INTO GV_KU_LANDX
SELECT SINGLE VBELN POSNR PSTYV MATNR MATKL
SELECT * FROM VEKP INTO TABLE IT_VEKP1
SELECT SINGLE MATNR LFIMG BRGEW NTGEW
SELECT SINGLE * FROM MARA INTO GV_MARA
* SELECT matnr maktx FROM makt INTO TABLE it_makt1
SELECT SINGLE * FROM VBRP INTO WA_VBRP
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = '0010' name = GV_SOLINE1 object = 'VBBP' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
* READ TABLE LV_LINES INTO WA_LINES INDEX 1.
" Unit weight and Net Weight should be
SELECT SINGLE WERKS INTO GV_PLANT FROM LIPS WHERE VBELN = WA_VEPO-VBELN.
SELECT SINGLE * FROM MAST INTO WA_MAST WHERE MATNR = WA_MAT_LIPS-MATNR
MENGE FROM STPO INTO TABLE IT_STPO
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = '0001' name = GV_SOPOTX object = 'VBBP' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
* LOOP AT it_stpo INTO wa_stpo where STLNR = wa_mast-stlnr .
SELECT SINGLE TYPE INTO GV_TYPE FROM MARA WHERE MATNR = WA_STPO-IDNRK.
SELECT SINGLE MAKTX INTO GV_MAKTX FROM MAKT WHERE MATNR = WA_STPO-IDNRK.
* SELECT SINGLE maktx INTO wa_vepo-short_text FROM makt WHERE matnr = wa_stpo-idnrk.
* MODIFY it_vepo FROM wa_vepo TRANSPORTING vhilm_ku v_matnr1 kdmat maktx gv_eng steuc zsize v_wt short_text ntgew.
